recommendations.recommendation: BUNDLING PATTERN: CPT 71046 denied 1 times for bundling (CO-97/CO-4) by HUMANA. $505.78 impact. Recommendation: Add CPT 71046 to 'bundling_risk' category in routing_configs/cpt_risk.json. This will increase risk score for claims with this code, routing them to REVIEW queue for modifier -59 check before submission.

config_change.rationale: CO-97/CO-4 bundling denial observed 1x for HUMANA

recommendations.recommendation: TIMELY FILING PATTERN: 6 claims denied (CO-29) for CIGNA. $328.28 lost. Recommendation: Reduce CIGNA timely filing urgency threshold in routing_configs/thresholds.json. Increase 'warning_days_remaining' from 30 to 45 days for CIGNA to give billing team more advance warning.

config_change.rationale: 6 claims exceeded CIGNA filing window in this batch
